items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 107.1 mph at a 32.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Cleveland Guardians, KC 6, CLE 2. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 3 strikeouts and 1 walk. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 107.1 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Guardians Recap
